Amid the uncertainty, Rachel Crosby voiced her support with a brief but firm social media reaction. For now, Crosby remains in Las Vegas while his future in the NFL continues to draw attention.

title: Amazon orders 90-day reset, what new policy means for engineers and other top leaders
description: Amazon is implementing new coding rules for engineers following recent outages, some linked to AI tools. A 90-day safety reset for "Tier-1 systems" mandates dual reviews for code changes, mandatory use of Modeled Change Management, and adherence to reliability standards. This response aims to prevent further order-impacting incidents.

title: Google, Microsoft, Palantir, IBM, Nvidia and Oracle are 'Iran’s new targets', claims report
description: Amidst escalating Middle East tensions, Iran's state media has identified major US tech firms like Microsoft, Nvidia, and IBM as potential targets. This warning follows an incident where Amazon's UAE data center was struck, causing a fire. The move signals a potential expansion of conflict into cyber and infrastructure warfare, with facilities in Israel, Dubai, and Abu Dhabi named.

title: Earth’s magnetic flips can last 70,000 years, new study finds
description: A weak field for 70,000 years could have exposed the atmosphere and surface life to significantly more solar radiation for a prolonged period

title: Groups to prevent human-elephant conflict linked to more elephant deaths
description: Anti-depredation squads were formed in villages to incentivise communities to join hands with the Forest Department to respond to elephants together. However, the searchlights and firecrackers the squads used to drive elephants away possibly created a ‘landscape of fear’, forcing elephants to stray into more dangerous situations
